meta.note: Runs once daily at 09:00 (n8n instance timezone — set it to Africa/Lagos). Calls the ET360 reminder endpoint, which decides whether today is a reminder day (every 3 days while >1 week out, then 7-day, 3-day, 1-day, and morning-of at 9am) and emails all registrants accordingly. The 'Header Auth account' credential sends header EMAIL_SECRET = the same secret as the site's EMAIL_SECERET env var. IMPORTANT: the URL targets the DP service DIRECTLY (uec-dp.up.railway.app), NOT the public www domain — Cloudflare on the www path strips headers containing underscores (EMAIL_SECRET), which makes the auth silently 401. If you must use the www URL, change the auth header to a hyphenated one instead: the endpoint also accepts 'x-reminder-secret: <secret>' or 'Authorization: Bearer <secret>', both of which survive Cloudflare. Endpoint is idempotent per calendar day — keep this as the only daily trigger.
